action: Do not commit regenerated sitemap churn. Restore frontend/public/sitemap.xml from origin/main after build validation if it changes.
determinism: generate-seo-assets.mjs writes sitemap.xml during prebuild; previous memory and this sprint classify sitemap churn as generated validation side effect unless intentionally reviewed.
release_gate_safety: No sitemap promotion is needed for Bengali audiobook exposure; audiobook endpoint is gated by backend/reader manifest, not sitemap.
